ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* The URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* The URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_email" TEXT /* The official email address of the team */,
  "team_phone" TEXT /* The official phone number of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the stats */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* The difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* The number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* The total number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* The total number of red cards received by the team */,
  "average_possession" REAL /* The average possession percentage during matches */,
  "average_pass_accuracy" REAL /* The average pass accuracy percentage during matches */,
  "average_shots_on_target" REAL /* The average number of shots on target per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the standing */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current league position of the team */,
  "percentage_score" REAL /* Percentage score based on team performance */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of games won by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* The difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "form" TEXT /* A string representing the team's recent form (e.g., "WWDWL") */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The player's nationality */,
  "height" INTEGER /* The player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The player's weight in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number */,
  "goals_assists" INTEGER /* The total number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* The total number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* The total number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* The total number of minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the player is currently injured (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The coach's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The coach's nationality */,
  "team_since" TEXT /* The date when the coach started coaching the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* The coach's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The coach's phone number */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* A brief description of the coach's coaching style */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* A text field for any notable achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match (in 24-hour format) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the match was home or away */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match in the format 'Team:Opponent' */,
  "match_venue" TEXT /* The name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* The name of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the match */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* The score of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Manager, Fan) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* The level of access granted to users with this role (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for intermediate, 3 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
